t1: Quick one — noticed your firm ranks for the big PI terms but the intake page still asks for a phone call first.
t2: We helped a similar firm turn that same page into signed cases without more ad spend. Worth a look?
unique_mechanism: intercept competitor-name searches with pages that book intake
